title: Session End — RAG System v2.0 Complete Enhancement
details:
Session 2026-07-03 completed. 15 commits pushed to GitHub (main branch).

## Implemented:
- Phase A: Remote embedder/reranker (EMBEDDER_ENDPOINT, RERANKER_ENDPOINT) with local fallback
- Phase A3: Per-request LLM provider routing (provider_type parameter)
- Phase B: SQLite user database (user_db.py), bcrypt, JWT token pairs, LDAP/AD (ldap_auth.py), RBAC enforcement
- Phase C: Embeddable chat widget (widget.html + widget.js, vanilla JS, SSE streaming)
- Phase D: Tools wired into LangGraph orchestrator (call_tools node), MCP rag_chat tool
- Phase E: Documentation audit — AGENTS.md, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, index.md all updated
- SLM local llama.cpp subprocess (LocalSLMClient in slm_router.py)
- Circuit breaker pattern (circuit_breaker.py) for Qdrant, reranker, LLM backend
- OpenTelemetry tracing (tracing.py) with zero-overhead no-op mode
- mypy clean — 0 errors in 45 source files
- Hardcoded config bugs fixed (RERANKER_FT_ENABLED, IMAGE_EXTRACTION_ENABLED)
- HyDE + Reflection enabled by default
- HITL JSONL log rotation (10MB limit, 5 backups)
- AuthMiddleware registered at startup
- 56 stale .bak files + 63MB dump deleted
- pyproject.toml version 2.0.0
- ADR-008: Java 25 + Quarkus hybrid migration architecture

## Test status: 1101 passed, 4 skipped, 0 failed

## Remaining for next session:
- Test coverage for new auth endpoints (register, logout)
- Federated RAG, Agentic Tools Expansion (v2.1+ roadmap)
- Infrastructure: Terraform, canary deployment, secrets rotation
- Evaluate Java/Quarkus migration (ADR-008 — Proposed)
